name: HDFC 6E Rewards Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 3% 6E Rewards on all IndiGo flight bookings
1.5% 6E Rewards on dining and entertainment spends
1% 6E Rewards on all other retail purchases

redemptionOptions: IndiGo flight bookings (1 point = ₹1 on IndiGo)

welcomeBenefits.description: IndiGo flight voucher worth ₹1,500 on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

additionalBenefits: 3% back on IndiGo bookings including flights and add-ons
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year
Priority check-in and boarding on IndiGo flights
Exclusive IndiGo sale access and priority waitlist clearance
pros: Welcome voucher of ₹1,500 covers the entire joining fee
3% return on IndiGo bookings is strong for frequent flyers
Points redeemable at ₹1 value on IndiGo flights
4 domestic lounge visits per year add good value
Priority boarding and check-in perks on IndiGo
cons: Reward points only redeemable on IndiGo, not transferable to other airlines
3.5% forex markup makes it poor for international travel spending
₹3L fee waiver threshold is relatively high for a mid-tier card
idealFor: Frequent IndiGo flyers who take 4+ domestic flights per year
Travelers who want to accumulate points for free IndiGo flights
Users looking for a travel-focused card with domestic lounge access

faqs.question: Can I use 6E Rewards on airlines other than IndiGo?
faqs.answer: No, 6E Rewards are exclusively redeemable on IndiGo flights, add-ons (meals, seats, baggage) and holiday packages. They cannot be transferred to other airline loyalty programs.

faqs.question: Does the 3% earn rate apply to IndiGo bookings through third-party sites?
faqs.answer: The 3% accelerated earn rate is applicable only on bookings made directly through IndiGo's website, app, or counters. Third-party bookings (MakeMyTrip, Yatra, etc.) earn at the standard 1% rate.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits do I get?
faqs.answer: You get 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year through the Visa Lounge Program. International lounge access is not included with this card.

faqs.question: Is the welcome voucher worth it?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹1,500 IndiGo welcome voucher fully covers the joining fee, effectively making the first year free if you use IndiGo flights.
